design_philosophy.core_loop: Explore dungeons, solve logic puzzles, defeat enemies, acquire better weapons/armor, progress through five interconnected dungeons
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balance between action-oriented combat encounters and challenging environmental puzzle sequences; tension between dungeon exploration and narrative discovery
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Young adventurer investigating the disappearance of their dragon-warrior father while commanding mystical jade creatures as companions
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Deliberately breaks from established RPG conventions by emphasizing puzzle-solving and dungeon design over traditional story progression. Heavy commitment to logic-based puzzles as core gameplay pillar rather than supplementary mechanic. Uses companion creatures (jades) as tactical depth rather than party-based RPG structure.

difficulty.checkpointing: Checkpoint system exists but criticized for requiring long dungeon replays upon death; described as having 'nasty tendency to make you replay long portions if you die'
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited player agency; difficulty curve becomes plodding in later game segments. Some reviewers noted the game 'did not give the player much room to breathe' with alternating action sequences and difficult puzzles

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon and armor acquisition system similar to The Legend of Zelda series; jade creatures level up by collecting blue XP orbs dropped by defeated enemies
progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential dungeon progression through five dungeons: Tower of Light, Ancient Ruins, Ice Castle, Droog Volcano, and Platinum. Hub towns (Arcs and Toronto) serve as bases between dungeon ventures
replayability_hooks: Battle arena in Toronto for competitive combat and gold wagering
Multiple equipment configurations to experiment with

world_building_techniques: Character-driven setup (protagonist Remeer's quest to find missing father, last dragon warrior)
Companion party narrative (four friends join quest: Kashian, Barness, Rein, Ferris)
Town NPCs and dialogue in hub locations

danger_signals: Father's mysterious disappearance on dragon quest
